textByHash.12a61a80dbbd36654ca6d332c0d1236a686633f5: Yes I do. Thankfully we can cope with almost anything. Jaraah really is a wonderful surgeon, his methods are a little unorthodox but he gets the job done.
textByHash.21ca2e591bfff3fd9939c6a55824206ffbe14916: Why, certainly my friend. However, owning such an item makes you part of an elite group and wearing it will double the speed of your hitpoints replenishing.
textByHash.3fe4d5c64e49c356db074a43e6dbcefca17322a1: Such a privilege will cost you 99,000 coins.
textByHash.55dbb3c810f5d36bd2e47c80769f2cfd35ea88de: I shouldn't tell you this but his nickname is 'The Butcher'.
textByHash.58f1fdd904d724b985799470ba396e43535885d8: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.
textByHash.5f3854cede1621830ce1e54af1395fa1518e9f98: Sorry, I'm under orders to not sell capes right now.
textByHash.7892d561d32ca91cd960ef8e3c34660579922639: Well come back and see me when you do.
textByHash.80ecc62501b60139fa765bafb86e8aa1ca0533a7: Certainly! Skillcapes are a symbol of achievement. Only people who have mastered a skill and reached level 99 can get their hands on them and gain the benefits they carry.
textByHash.9725b697e6ab03561d8345e76126f34a1c7c60ac: The Cape of Hitpoints doubles the speed of your hitpoints replenishing when worn. Is there anything else I can help you with?
textByHash.e13e4fefd86e8310a7f3fa2bb5ac2fcfcf1c6e70: I'm sorry you feel that way. Still if you change your mind...
textByHash.f26949a55f83d142c26c6e21de96696403cccaad: No way, I'm out of here just as soon as I've packed up my stuff!
textByHash.f5650c80062fa11d7860a9f23feb8e1e73eeec23: Wear this cape in good health, my friend.
textByHash.feb1b32de4c421fc949a6038c64e2a0dcdbdd4a3: Most certainly, and free of charge!
